final:
module reset_controller (
    input wire clk,
    input wire rst,
    output reg out
);

  wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge rst or posedge dbg_halt) begin
    if (rst) begin
        out <= 0;
    end else begin
        out <= ~out;
    end
end

endmodule
